title: AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF THE BARRIO OF PADILDIL IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF SAN QUINTIN, PROVINCE OF ABRA, TO VILLA MERCEDES.

chunks.text:
H. No. 3139 / 55 OG No. 40, 8450 (October 5, 1959)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 2607, June 21, 1959 ]

AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF THE BARRIO OF PADILDIL IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF SAN QUINTIN, PROVINCE OF ABRA, TO VILLA MERCEDES.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The name of the barrio of Padildil in the Municipality of San Quintin, Province of Abra, is changed to Villa Mercedes.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Enacted without executive approval, June 21, 1959.
